creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 226054
deskutils/remind: update to 03.03.07

This patch updates deskutils/remind to 03.03.07 and takes over maintainership of this unmaintained port.

It also adds two new sets of options:

* an option to select A4 paper by default

* an option to have the program localised.  Unfortunately, only one language at a time is supported by the program.  Perhaps this should be done with flavors in future porting effort.

Patch tested with Poudriere on arm64 and armv7 FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE.

Portlint seems to be happy but is confused about the way LANG_?? is treated.
